query:
-- Software License Categories
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS software_license_categories (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  department VARCHAR(100),
  icon VARCHAR(50),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Software Licenses
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS software_licenses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  categoryId INT,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  vendor VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(50),
  licenseType ENUM('subscription', 'perpetual', 'floating', 'site', 'open_source') DEFAULT 'subscription' NOT NULL,
  licenseKey TEXT,
  totalSeats INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  usedSeats INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  costPerSeat DECIMAL(10, 2),
  totalCost DECIMAL(10, 2),
  billingCycle ENUM('monthly', 'annual', 'one_time') DEFAULT 'annual' NOT NULL,
  purchaseDate TIMESTAMP,
  renewalDate TIMESTAMP,
  expirationDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('active', 'expired', 'cancelled', 'pending') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Software License Assignments
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS software_license_assignments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  licenseId INT NOT NULL,
  assignedTo VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  assignedType ENUM('user', 'department', 'role') DEFAULT 'user' NOT NULL,
  assignedDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  revokedDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('active', 'revoked') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Software Vendor Contracts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS software_vendor_contracts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vendorName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  contractType ENUM('enterprise', 'volume', 'support', 'maintenance') DEFAULT 'enterprise' NOT NULL,
  contractNumber VARCHAR(100),
  startDate TIMESTAMP,
  endDate TIMESTAMP,
  annualValue DECIMAL(10, 2),
  supportLevel ENUM('basic', 'standard', 'premium', 'enterprise') DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL,
  contactName VARCHAR(100),
  contactEmail VARCHAR(200),
  contactPhone VARCHAR(50),
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('active', 'expired', 'pending_renewal') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Online Course Details
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS online_course_details (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  courseId INT NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('financial_sovereignty', 'laws_framework', 'governance_civics', 'entrepreneurship', 'creative_enterprise', 'core_academic', 'professional_development', 'simulator_training') NOT NULL,
  gradeLevel ENUM('k_2', '3_5', '6_8', '9_12', 'adult', 'all_ages') DEFAULT 'all_ages' NOT NULL,
  courseType ENUM('proprietary', 'licensed', 'oer', 'partnership') DEFAULT 'proprietary' NOT NULL,
  deliveryMethod ENUM('asynchronous', 'synchronous', 'hybrid', 'self_paced') DEFAULT 'asynchronous' NOT NULL,
  creditHours DECIMAL(4, 2),
  duration VARCHAR(50),
  syllabus TEXT,
  lmsUrl TEXT,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Curriculum Projects
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS curriculum_projects (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  projectType ENUM('course_development', 'assessment_design', 'instructor_guide', 'accreditation_docs', 'lms_setup', 'full_curriculum') NOT NULL,
  scope TEXT,
  deliverables JSON,
  contractorId INT,
  contractorName VARCHAR(200),
  contractorCompany VARCHAR(200),
  budget DECIMAL(10, 2),
  amountPaid DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  startDate TIMESTAMP,
  targetEndDate TIMESTAMP,
  actualEndDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('planning', 'contracted', 'in_progress', 'review', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'planning' NOT NULL,
  grantFunded BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  grantId INT,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Academy Instructors
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS academy_instructors (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(200),
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  instructorType ENUM('credentialed', 'sme_guest', 'adjunct', 'full_time') DEFAULT 'adjunct' NOT NULL,
  credentials JSON,
  specializations JSON,
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(8, 2),
  contractStatus ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'pending') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  supervisorId INT,
  backgroundCheckDate TIMESTAMP,
  backgroundCheckStatus ENUM('pending', 'cleared', 'expired') DEFAULT 'pending',
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- SME Contributors
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sme_contributors (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  familyMemberId INT,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  expertise JSON,
  entityAffiliation VARCHAR(100),
  contributionTypes JSON,
  availability ENUM('available', 'limited', 'unavailable') DEFAULT 'available' NOT NULL,
  totalContributions INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Facility Plans
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS facility_plans (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  facilityType ENUM('education_center', 'training_facility', 'mixed_use', 'satellite') DEFAULT 'education_center' NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  plannedCapacity INT,
  estimatedCost DECIMAL(12, 2),
  landRequirements TEXT,
  buildingRequirements JSON,
  status ENUM('concept', 'planning', 'land_search', 'land_acquired', 'design', 'construction', 'operational') DEFAULT 'concept' NOT NULL,
  targetOpenDate TIMESTAMP,
  linkedLandAcquisitionId INT,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Accreditation Records
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accreditation_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  accreditingBody VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  accreditationType ENUM('regional', 'national', 'programmatic', 'state') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('researching', 'applying', 'pending', 'accredited', 'probation', 'revoked') DEFAULT 'researching' NOT NULL,
  applicationDate TIMESTAMP,
  grantedDate TIMESTAMP,
  expirationDate TIMESTAMP,
  renewalDate TIMESTAMP,
  requirements JSON,
  documentsSubmitted JSON,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
